title: Nicola Spring Halloween Coir Door Mat - 60 x 40cm - Wizards Welcome - Pack of 1 - Decorative Indoor Front Door Floor Mat Entry Dirt Trapper Rug Outdoor Boot Scraper Non Slip Backing Doormat
features: Spooky Halloween-Themed Designs – Add a frightfully fun touch to your doorstep with these Halloween-themed doormats, designed to bring a spooky yet stylish welcome to guests, trick-or-treaters, and visitors alike.

Durable Natural Coir Construction – Made from tough coir coconut fibres, these mats provide exceptional durability and stiff bristles that quickly and efficiently remove dirt, dust, and mud from shoes to keep your home clean.

Non-Slip PVC Backing for Safety – A sturdy black PVC backing ensures the mat stays firmly in place, preventing slips while trapping water and moisture to protect your interior floors from the elements.

Perfectly Sized for Any Entrance – Designed for practicality and style, each doormat measures 60cm in width, 40cm in depth, and 1.5cm in height, making them the ideal size for front doors, patios, and entryways.

Easy to Clean & Maintain – Simply beat the mat with a broom handle to remove dirt, then brush with a little water and allow it to air dry flat, ensuring long-lasting use throughout spooky season and beyond.
description: Product Description (Trick or) Treat your doorstep and raise some seasonal spirits with the Halloween Door Mats collection from Nicola Spring. Crafted from natural coir coconut fibres, these welcome mats provide an innate strength and durability that is perfectly suited to brushing dirt, dust, mud and muck from the soles of your shoes. A non-slip PVC backing traps moisture and water while keeping your interior carpets protected. Coming in a range of spooky styles - find the perfect fit for your haunted house!
